# DataViews.pro — SFMC Data View Reference & SQL Workspace

> An interactive reference and SQL workspace for Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC) system Data Views.

## Summary

- **Product**: DataViews.pro
- **Tagline**: SFMC Data View Reference & SQL Workspace
- **Purpose**: Interactive schema registry, relationship explorer, and SQL generator for SFMC system Data Views
- **Architect**: Ujjwal Tiwari — Senior Salesforce Platform Architect, Waterloo, Ontario, Canada
- **Website**: https://ujjwaltiwari.com
- **Scope**: 29+ core SFMC marketing data views including _Subscribers, _Job, _Sent, _Open, _Click, _Bounce, _Journey, and Mobile Push views
- **Status**: Version 1.0 (General Availability)

## Full documentation

For complete platform details, feature list, data view index, and attribution, see:
https://dataviews.pro/llms-full.txt

## Key capabilities

- Browse and search all SFMC Data View schemas with field types and descriptions
- Visual join-path discovery with BFS routing across related tables
- SQL Sandbox with auto-generated JOINs, bridge tables, and copy-to-clipboard output
- AI Copilot assistance for query design and schema exploration

## Legal

- Privacy Policy: https://dataviews.pro/privacy/
- Terms of Use: https://dataviews.pro/terms/

## SQL Guides

Practitioner articles with copy-ready SQL:
https://dataviews.pro/guides/

## Attribution

Engineered with Gemini and Cursor AI. Schemas grounded on official Salesforce Documentation, Mateusz Dąbrowski's SFMC technical blog, dataviews.io, and established SFMC practitioner query patterns.
